title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. mertinii
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. mertinii, also known as a subspecies of hawkweed, is a perennial plant that belongs to the dandelion family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium lachenalii subsp. mertinii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. This plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion for medicinal purposes, and it can also be used topically in the form of a salve or ointment.
